title: Adventure Map Utilities
description: Different Utilities like keybinds for adventure maps
body:
![AMU](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f618982cc304e1254feffe9e6c6bffa4f1152e2.png)
Different Utilities like keybinds for adventure maps

![Information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87250c3b65e404919e19ffc2780f96ae1dbe84e4.png)
This is a mod that helps adventure maps to make use of keybindings in a way, in which no mod needs to be installed on the server, but rather it is programmed via data packs.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e84bb3068f031e198c965742577cb0e9b412b41.png)
Keybinds:

3 different Keybinds, which can activate a function in an adventure map  
![Keybindings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36ac47ff77d16353b1e507d4e14090637c5cb880.png)

Options(In-Game):

You can change if the different keybinds should be active, whether automatic disabling should be on and you can test if an integration is present.  
![Ingame Options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43df4ae0c14e2ac1029bf955e7409d66b31d1ce0.png)

Options(Extern):

In addition to all of the in-game options, you can also change whether a button that leads to the in-game config should be present in the options screen. (You can still access the in-game config via the mod screen if modmenu is installed)  
![External Options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f28892b0ac31b0fd39fd80af3b327aa125fc781.png)

Automatic Disabling:  

Tests for an integration when pressing a keybind for the first time on a world/server.  
If no integration is present, further keybinds will be disabled.  
You can overrule this by disabling the option "Automatic Disabling".

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fa95926a82dde8eed111b05bc9691e6490e043d.png)
An example that uses this mod is my [Hide & Seek map](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/hide-amp-seek-5111631/)

![Tutorial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfeaecbefb0fd50e617c2afe6a9c661c7fccdc92.png)

You can download the example data pack [here](https://www.mediafire.com/file/zdz22cv1fjui4wt/AMU.zip/file)!

![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57da7bbf5d3a1c20011583d76531bfd223c26b71.png)

Mod by Caoten_hoch2
  
[![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/5fbT8jJ)
